title: From Mayerling to Sarajevo
writer: Carl Zuckmayer, Marcelle Maurette, Curt Alexander
actors: Edwige Feuillère, John Lodge, Aimé Clariond
plot: In the late 1800's, Franz Ferdinand, heir to the Austro-Hungarian empire, falls for Sophie Chotek, a Czech countess. He's already a problem to the Crown because of his political ideas; this love affair with someone not of royal bl...
